columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly mention or analyze results based on synchronous metastases.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly mention or analyze results based on metachronous metastases.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: Yes. The study prospectively stratified patients according to high or low volume of metastatic disease. Figure 1B (page 6) shows Kaplan-Meier estimates of overall survival for patients with high-volume disease. Table 1 (page 5) shows the number of patients with high vs low volume metastases at baseline. Figure 2 (page 7) shows hazard ratios for death in subgroups, including high vs low volume.

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: Yes. The study prospectively stratified patients according to high or low volume of metastatic disease. Figure 1C (page 6) shows Kaplan-Meier estimates of overall survival for patients with low-volume disease. Table 1 (page 5) shows the number of patients with high vs low volume metastases at baseline. Figure 2 (page 7) shows hazard ratios for death in subgroups, including high vs low volume.
